name: Honey Almond Tartlets
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut butter into flour thoroughly using a pastry blender.
2. With a fork, blend in sour cream until combined.
3. Divide the dough into two portions and wrap each in aluminum foil or plastic wrap. Refrigerate for at least 8 hours.
4. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
5. Roll out one portion of the pastry on a well-floured cloth-covered board to form a circle, approximately 1/16 inch thick. Cut into 4-inch rounds and refrigerate any remaining scraps before rolling again.
6. From two-thirds of the round pastry pieces, cut out 2-inch circles. Place the plain round halves onto an ungreased baking sheet.
7. Brush each tartlet with sugar glaze.
8. Fill each tartlet with a layer containing the center removed (3 layers total: 1 plain and 2 with centers removed). Brush with glaze again.
9. Repeat steps 6-8 with the second portion of pastry dough.
10. Bake for 25 minutes or until lightly browned. Allow to cool.
11. To make the filling, blend cream cheese and honey; stir in toasted almonds. Spoon into the tartlets and place strawberries on top.
